metadata.description: Public AI coding tool plugin marketplace — safety, quality, and productivity plugins for Claude Code and compatible tools

plugins.name: bash-guardrails
plugins.description: Auto-approve hook for Claude Code's Bash tool — reduces unnecessary permission prompts for safe pipelines, find -exec, here-strings, shell loops/conditionals, and allowlisted commands

plugins.name: mdlint
plugins.description: Auto-format and lint markdown files written by Claude Code — prettier + markdownlint on every Write/Edit
